ontology.foodex2_gap_note: No FoodEx2 code exists for fried fruit-filled hand pie; 'Pastries and cakes' (A0CKP) is the closest defensible parent.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard Jollibee Peach Mango Pie piece weighing approximately 85 g, as served at the restaurant counter.

nutrient_source.title: Jollibee Peach Mango Pie — Nutrition Facts (USDA Branded Food / Jollibee Foods Corporation label data)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values derived from USDA FoodData Central Branded Foods entry for Jollibee Peach Mango Pie (FDC ID 2344678 / equivalent branded label data). Values expressed per 100 g by back-calculation from the 85 g serving label. Where micronutrients are not reported on the label, sentinel value -1 is used.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index of fruit-filled fried pastry / pie crust analogous estimate based on wheat-flour pastry with fruit filling
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for Jollibee Peach Mango Pie. GI estimated at 65 (medium) based on the University of Sydney GI Database entry for wheat-flour pastry / fruit pie analogues (GI range 55–70 for similar fried dough and fruit-filled pastry products). Glycemic load per serving calculated as (GI × carbohydrate_g per serving) / 100 = (65 × 38.0) / 100 ≈ 24.7, rounded to 24.8. Carbohydrate per serving = 44.7 g/100 g × 85 g serving = 38.0 g.

hypertension.key_factor: Sodium content (224 mg per 100 g; approximately 190 mg per serving)
hypertension.guidance: Individuals managing hypertension should limit consumption of Peach Mango Pie due to its moderate sodium content (~190 mg per piece) and high refined-carbohydrate load, which may contribute to fluid retention and elevated blood pressure when consumed regularly.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic load (GL ≈ 24.8 per serving) and elevated sugar content (16.5 g sugar per 100 g)
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should treat Peach Mango Pie as an occasional indulgence only, as its high glycemic load (~24.8 per piece) and significant sugar content are likely to cause a marked postprandial blood glucose rise; portion control and pairing with low-GI foods are strongly advised.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat content (6.5 g per 100 g; ~5.5 g per serving) from vegetable shortening used in deep-frying
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit Peach Mango Pie intake due to its saturated fat contribution (~5.5 g per serving) from deep-frying in vegetable shortening, which may adversely affect LDL cholesterol levels when consumed frequently.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Peach Mango Pie is a signature deep-fried hand pie sold by Jollibee, the Filipino fast-food chain. It consists of a golden, flaky wheat-flour pastry shell encasing a sweet, warm filling made from diced peaches and mangoes cooked with sugar to a jam-like consistency. The exterior is crisp and lightly blistered from deep-frying in vegetable shortening, while the interior is soft, fruity, and intensely sweet. The pie is served hot and is a popular dessert or snack item at Jollibee outlets worldwide, including Singapore. Each piece weighs approximately 85 g and provides around 270 kcal, 14 g of fat (predominantly saturated), and 38 g of carbohydrates with about 14 g of sugar. Its medium glycemic index (~65) and high glycemic load (~24.8 per serving) make it a high-impact carbohydrate food. Clinically, it is of concern for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes due to its sugar and refined-carbohydrate content, and for those with cardiovascular disease due to its saturated fat from frying. It is halal-certified at Jollibee Singapore outlets and contains wheat gluten as a primary allergen. The product is ultra-processed and is best consumed as an occasional treat rather than a regular dietary item.
common_user_queries: How many calories in a Jollibee Peach Mango Pie?
Is Jollibee Peach Mango Pie halal in Singapore?
What is the sugar content of Peach Mango Pie?
Is Peach Mango Pie suitable for diabetics?
What is the GI of Jollibee Peach Mango Pie?
What allergens are in Jollibee Peach Mango Pie?
How much fat is in a Peach Mango Pie?

confidence_reason: Nutrient values are derived from USDA FoodData Central Branded Foods data for Jollibee Peach Mango Pie, which represents label-declared values and is an approved secondary global source. GI is an analogous estimate from the University of Sydney GI Database as no direct measurement for this specific product exists. Confidence is therefore medium rather than high.
notes: 1. Nutrient values are per 100 g, back-calculated from the 85 g serving label data available via USDA FoodData Central Branded Foods. 2. monounsaturated_fat_g is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition label or in the USDA branded entry. 3. polyunsaturated_fat_g is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition label or in the USDA branded entry. 4. trans_fat_g is 0.0; confirmed zero per product label (Jollibee reformulated to remove trans fats). 5. cholesterol_mg is 0.0; confirmed zero per product label — the filling and pastry use vegetable-based fats with no animal-derived cholesterol sources declared. 6. potassium_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 7. calcium_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 8. iron_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 9. vitamin_c_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 10. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 11. vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 12. vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 13. vitamin_b3_niacin_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 14. vitamin_b6_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 15. vitamin_b12_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 16. folate_mcg_dfe is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 17. vitamin_d_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 18. vitamin_e_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 19. phosphorus_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 20. magnesium_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 21. zinc_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 22. selenium_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 23. water_g is -1 as it is not reported in the source label data. 24. GI of 65 is an analogous estimate from the University of Sydney GI Database for wheat-flour pastry with fruit filling; no direct GI measurement for Jollibee Peach Mango Pie was found in the approved GI database. 25. The food is classified under Fast Food cuisine as served at Jollibee Singapore (Bugis Village), though its origin is Filipino. 26.
